prestazioni: F140 EB 6.3L V12 naturally aspirated engine: Full titanium Akrapović Evolution Line exhaust system with quad 100mm carbon-fiber tips, replacing the OEM manifolds and catalytic converters for a 12% reduction in backpressure and +38hp at 8,500 RPM (verified on a Dynojet 424x with 93-octane fuel).

F140 EB-specific Motec M150 ECU reflash with custom ignition timing maps optimized for Shell V-Power 100 octane, increasing torque from 514 lb-ft to 542 lb-ft at 5,750 RPM while maintaining Ferrari’s OEM knock sensors and lambda feedback loops.

Brembo GT 380x34mm front brake kit with 6-piston monobloc calipers, 2-piece floating rotors, and Pagid RSL29 race pads, reducing unsprung weight by 18% and improving fade resistance by 42% during 10-lap endurance testing at Mugello Circuit.
estetica: Novitec Rosso N-Largo widebody conversion kit, extending the rear fenders by 60mm per side to accommodate 21x12.5-inch OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels with 295/30 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, while maintaining the OEM carbon-fiber door sills and rear diffuser.
Gintani carbon-fiber front splitter with integrated canards and a 3D-printed titanium support structure, reducing front lift by 28% at 200 km/h (validated in Ferrari’s Fiorano wind tunnel).

Luxury Customs carbon-fiber engine cover with a clear-coated weave finish, exposing the F140 EB’s intake plenums and replacing the OEM plastic cover, paired with a custom Novitec carbon-fiber air intake system with billet aluminum velocity stacks.
